nasb.text: Under their direction was an elite army of 307,500, who could wage war with great power, to help the king against the enemy.

esv.text: Under their command was an army of 307,500, who could make war with mighty power, to help the king against the enemy.

cnv.text: 在他們指揮下的軍隊，共有三十萬七千五百人，都是大有能力，善於作戰的，能幫助王攻打仇敵。

ccb.text: 他们手下有三十万七千五百精兵，随时帮助王攻打敌人。
